title: T-040 — UI: PLN-016 PO Approval modal (parity with po_approval_modal)
prompt:
Build PLN-016 PO Approval modal at `src/components/planning/po/POApprovalModal.tsx` matching prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:228-264` 1:1.

Mode toggle (Approve / Reject) via ToggleGroup. ReasonInput (Textarea, minLength=10, required). PO summary rows (po_number, supplier, total). Dual-path footer renders Approve or Reject based on mode.

RBAC: only callers with planning.po.approve role can submit. onConfirm calls T-013 endpoints. Outbox emits per side-effect contract.

RED RTL test asserts mode toggle, minLength=10 enforcement, RBAC denial path, dual-path footer.

pipeline_inputs.description: PO approve/reject modal with toggle + reason + dual-path footer.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/modals.jsx:228-264. Translation notes: mode toggle → Radix ToggleGroup; ReasonInput minLength=10 → react-hook-form with zod .min(10); approve calls T-013 approve route, reject calls T-013 reject route. Parity checklist: (1) toggle pill labels, (2) ReasonInput placeholder + char counter, (3) summary rows order, (4) footer button visibility per mode.
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:228-264`, then mode toggle pills, ReasonInput, summary rows, and footer match prototype — parity verified by RTL test.
Given mode='Reject' and reason='ok' (2 chars), when Submit clicked, then Zod error renders inline and no API call fires.
Given a caller without planning.po.approve, when modal renders, then submit button is disabled with tooltip 'You do not have approval rights'.

Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/po/__tests__/POApprovalModal.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures. Given the UI task is closed, then CLOSEOUT includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL parity + Zod min length + RBAC disable.
Playwright e2e: approve a pending_approval PO, expect status badge → confirmed.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass RBAC client-side as defense in depth.
Do not allow reject without notes ≥ 10 chars.
ui_closeout_evidence: Playwright trace artifact for each happy path and blocked/error path exercised by the task.
Desktop screenshots/artifacts for each implemented page/modal state compared against prototype line references.
Attach artifact paths in CLOSEOUT with changed files, test commands/results, and acceptance criteria status.
